Load sample data

Clicking Load sample data will load data into this Concert instance. To skip loading sample data into Concert, press Cancel.



If you want to delete the sample data later, it can be deleted from the Administration settings page.



If you want to take tours with the loaded sample data, check out the Get started option under the Help menu.

    Upload data

    Close
    The ConcertDef SBOM schema can be used to represent the three distinct phases of the development cycle (application, build, and deploy). Upload any combination of files that represent these three phases.
    Note: Tags that have one or more spaces or more than 20 characters aren't allowed.
    Uploading a new version will replace the existing application, as versioning is currently not supported.
    Select one or more files
    Format: JSON

        Vulnerability priorities

        Recompute vulnerability priorities

        Close

        Changing the vulnerability priorities requires recomputing the scores across all applicable objects that work with vulnerabilities in this IBM Concert instance. The computed vulnerability risk score will change across the instance and will take several minutes to complete. This will affect all users on this instance.

        You can undo or change the score calculation again, but you will have to recompute vulnerability priorities.

        How to read this

        Resilience graphic

        Close

        These NFR categories—or outcomes—feed into the overall resilience score. Each category also has its own resilience score, which is made up of different NFRs and their input metrics.

        Each category has related actions that can be taken to possibly improve the score.

        Resilience risk scores
        • Critical
        • High
        • Medium
        • Low
        • Very low
        • Target threshold score
